title: rubus angustulus
intro: Rubus angustulus is a thorny shrub native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is also known as Himalayan Raspberry. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus angustulus include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus angustulus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues.
